title: epischoenus lucidus
intro: Epischoenus lucidus is a type of plant species that belongs to the sedge family and is native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Epischoenus lucidus include the ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
